frictions.description: Store::open() uses std::env::current_dir() which cannot be easily mocked in parallel tests. Tests verify the underlying discover_werk_dir() logic through Store::init() and functional verification.
frictions.resolution: Used Store::init to create .werk directories and verified discovery logic through test_store_at_ancestor_is_functional

summary: Rerun of 3 previously blocked store assertions: all 3 now pass. Tests added in store_discovery.rs provide automated validation of directory discovery (tree walking, global fallback) and error handling (permission denied, IO errors). Total 60 store-related tests pass.
